prompt_order.title: FRONTIER_RECONCILIATION_AND_HANDOFF-0
human_review_requirements: receipt_and_provenance_reclassification FULL review if any shadow or parallel evidence is promoted toward canonical receipt truth
trust_root_governance_changes FULL review if any work implies trust-root promotion rotation revocation execution or publication execution
distributed_authority_model_changes FULL review if any work implies authority movement handoff legality or cutover legality beyond closed Ζ scope
frontier_realization_rebinding FULL review if any blocked or future-only frontier item is proposed as near-term executable scope
stop_conditions: stop if POST-ZETA-0 reopens blocked Ζ frontier items as if they were already admitted
stop if POST-ZETA-0 treats bounded-only proof-only or guarded later-wave families as realization complete
stop if POST-ZETA-0 bypasses the explicit handoff boundary between completed Ζ doctrine and unresolved frontier realization
notes: This prompt begins post-Ζ frontier reconciliation and consolidation rather than a new internal Ζ band.
It must preserve the exact completed admissible Ζ envelope and hand off blocked realization-heavy work honestly.

prompt_order.title: POST_FRONTIER_RECONCILIATION_ADMISSION_REVIEW-0
human_review_requirements: checkpoint must verify completed admissible Ζ scope was preserved exactly
checkpoint must verify no bounded-only proof-only or guarded later-wave family widened by convenience
checkpoint must verify no blocked or future-only frontier item was silently re-admitted
stop_conditions: stop before any new frontier realization-planning band until this checkpoint exists
notes: This checkpoint validates the post-Ζ handoff before any new frontier planning or realization-adjacent band is proposed.

stability.replacement_target: later post-zeta frontier planning artifacts may refine sequence without replacing the ordering law frozen here
